cards.title: Decomposition
cards.governance_note: Break complex problems into meaningful, testable, recomposable parts.

cards.title: Stepwise Reasoning
cards.governance_note: Arrange steps, branches, loops, checks, and stopping conditions coherently.

cards.title: Recomposition
cards.governance_note: Review whether the parts recombine into a meaningful whole.

cards.title: Decomposition Risk
cards.governance_note: Watch for fragmentation, hidden dependencies, context loss, local optimization, and responsibility diffusion.
